heading: This Afternoon
text: Partly cloudy, except mostly cloudy in the Adirondacks and near the international border. Highs in the upper 50s to lower 60s, some mid 50s east of the Greens and in the Adirondacks. Southwest winds gusting to 25 mph, except to 35 mph in the Champlain Valley, and to 45 mph in the St. Lawrence Valley.

heading: Tonight
text: Clear to partly cloudy. Lows from the mid 30s to around 40, with some lower 40s in the broad valleys west, and around 30 northeast and the Adirondacks. Southwest winds 10 to 15 mph, gusting to 25 mph early, and diminishing overnight east of the Greens.

heading: Tuesday
text: Mostly to partly sunny, except becoming mostly cloudy after noon in New York. Highs in the low to mid 60s in the south, and upper 50s to lower 60s north, except low to mid 50s in the St. Lawrence Valley. Southwest winds 5 to 15 mph, except becoming north near the international border.
